mapper.select: SELECT approval_request_id, approval_document_type, approval_document_id, approval_request_type, approval_requester_id, approval_approver_id, approval_comment, approval_reason, approval_review_snapshot, approval_requested_at, approval_reviewed_at, approval_status FROM approval_requests WHERE approval_request_id = #{approvalRequestId}

SELECT approval_request_id, approval_document_type, approval_document_id, approval_request_type, approval_requester_id, approval_approver_id, approval_comment, approval_reason, approval_review_snapshot, approval_requested_at, approval_reviewed_at, approval_status FROM approval_requests

SELECT approval_request_id, approval_document_type, approval_document_id, approval_request_type, approval_requester_id, approval_approver_id, approval_comment, approval_reason, approval_review_snapshot, approval_requested_at, approval_reviewed_at, approval_status FROM approval_requests ORDER BY approval_request_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
